Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters

Class AutoRewrites

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.EmptyInputReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AbstractAutoRewrites
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.rewriters.AutoRewrites
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner, IVersionedReasoner
Direct Known Subclasses:
AutoRewritesL0, AutoRewritesL1, AutoRewritesL2, AutoRewritesL3, AutoRewritesL4, AutoRewritesL5
public abstract class AutoRewrites extends AbstractAutoRewrites implements IVersionedReasoner
Common implementation of the org.eventb.core.seqprover.autoRewrites reasoner. There are as many sub-classes as levels of this reasoner.

    • getVersion

      public final int getVersion()
      Description copied from interface: IVersionedReasoner
      Returns the current version of this reasoner.

      The version number is incremented whenever the reasoner code changes.

      Specified by:
      getVersion in interface IVersionedReasoner
      Returns:
      a non-negative integer
